image:image.image:title: SMEx Results Page
emotilink therapist's appointments page
the graide network teacher's dashboard
coach mobile dashboard
SMEx – Supplier Management Expert home page
image:image.image:caption: Hero screenshot of SMEx, the centralized supplier search tool built for JPMorgan Chase's Legal department.

image:image.image:title: SMEx experience map – supplier discovery process
image:image.image:caption: Experience map showing the fragmented process employees used to find a supplier before SMEx was built.

image:image.image:title: SMEx user journey map – before the solution
image:image.image:caption: Journey map showing pain points in the supplier selection workflow before SMEx.

image:image.image:title: SMEx UX research – importance score survey results
image:image.image:caption: Survey results used to calculate importance scores and prioritize data fields for the SMEx interface.

image:image.image:title: SMEx screen flow diagram
image:image.image:caption: Screen flow mapping the end-to-end navigation and task flows in SMEx.

image:image.image:title: SMEx user journey map – after the solution
image:image.image:caption: Journey map showing the improved supplier selection experience after SMEx was delivered.

image:image.image:title: SMEx process – initial user flow whiteboard session
image:image.image:caption: Whiteboard with an early user flow diagram from the SMEx discovery and design process.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink telehealth platform – hero banner
image:image.image:caption: Banner image for Emotilink, a HIPAA-compliant mental health telehealth platform.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink storyboard panel 1 – Isolation
image:image.image:caption: Panel 1 of the Emotilink storyboard: Sara sits alone after a breakup, not yet reaching for support.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink storyboard panel 2 – Discovery
image:image.image:caption: Panel 2: Sara searches for online therapy and finds Emotilink, browsing therapist profiles.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink storyboard panel 3 – Request and review
image:image.image:caption: Panel 3: Therapist Gina receives Sara's session request and reviews the intake form.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink storyboard panel 4 – Confirmation
image:image.image:caption: Panel 4: Sara receives the appointment confirmation notification on her phone.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink storyboard panel 5 – Preparation
image:image.image:caption: Panel 5: Gina reviews Sara's patient notes before the session begins.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink storyboard panel 6 – Connection
image:image.image:caption: Panel 6: Sara joins her first therapy session — the journey from isolation to support is complete.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink therapist desktop app – navigation
image:image.image:caption: Navigation screen of the Emotilink therapist-facing desktop application.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink therapist desktop app – schedule screen
image:image.image:caption: Schedule screen showing upcoming appointments and patient details for Emotilink therapists.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink therapist desktop app – in-session screen
image:image.image:caption: In-session screen for Emotilink therapists, featuring patient video, session notes, and emergency contact.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink therapist desktop app – notifications and appointment requests
image:image.image:caption: Notifications screen where Emotilink therapists manage incoming session requests.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink therapist desktop app – appointment confirmations
image:image.image:caption: Confirmations tab in the Emotilink notifications screen showing confirmed and declined appointments.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink user research – affinity mapping session
image:image.image:caption: Designers grouping user research quotes on a whiteboard during the Emotilink discovery phase.

image:image.image:title: Emotilink design process – paper sketches
image:image.image:caption: Early paper sketches of the Emotilink mobile experience on a desk during the design process.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network teacher dashboard
image:image.image:caption: Dashboard screen of The Graide Network platform connecting teachers with undergraduate graders.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network SWOT analysis
image:image.image:caption: SWOT analysis mapping The Graide Network's position in the education technology ecosystem.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network teacher journey map
image:image.image:caption: Journey map matching teacher pain points with platform improvement opportunities.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network – cover page usability finding
image:image.image:caption: Usability research finding showing how graders missed directions on the cover page spreadsheet.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network – individual grade summary screen
image:image.image:caption: Individual grade summary screen surfacing rubric-level student performance insights for teachers.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network – class report screen
image:image.image:caption: Class report screen showing overall grades and performance data across the full student roster.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network – student performance page
image:image.image:caption: Student page with visual performance graphs across rubric criteria, designed to be printable for students.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network paper prototype – messaging finding
image:image.image:caption: Paper prototype concept testing finding on homepage messaging and teacher-grader communication.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network paper prototype – post assignment flow
image:image.image:caption: Paper prototype showing the class-first assignment posting flow tested with teachers.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network paper prototype – student report groupings
image:image.image:caption: Paper prototype concept showing visual, sortable student reports with grouping recommendations.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network user research – affinity mapping session
image:image.image:caption: UX designers grouping user research quotes by theme on a sticky-note wall during The Graide Network project.

image:image.image:title: The Graide Network concept testing – paper prototypes
image:image.image:caption: Paper prototypes used during concept testing sessions with teachers for The Graide Network.

image:image.image:title: COACH fitness app – iPhone mockup
image:image.image:caption: iPhone mockup of COACH, an app connecting users with professional personal trainers virtually and in person.

image:image.image:title: COACH app – concept 2 mid-fidelity prototype
image:image.image:caption: Mid-fidelity prototype for COACH concept 2: coach pairing programs combining in-person and online support.

image:image.image:title: COACH app – concept 3 mid-fidelity prototype
image:image.image:caption: Mid-fidelity prototype for COACH concept 3: gamification and accountability features for consistent workouts.

image:image.image:title: COACH app – final product evolution banner
image:image.image:caption: Banner image for the COACH final product evolution section, showing the hybrid coaching model.

image:image.image:title: COACH research – design team affinity mapping session
image:image.image:caption: UX designers organizing research insights on a sticky-note wall during the COACH user research phase.
